name: Garden Sphere Floor Lamp - LIT4343 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your living space with the garden sphere floor lamp in a stunning gold finish. Crafted from durable iron, this lamp combines form and function in a design that complements both classic and modern interiors. The elegant sphere at its center introduces a touch of sophistication, making it a standout piece in any room. Its warm glow adds coziness, perfect for creating a welcoming atmosphere. Whether placed in your living room, bedroom, or study, this lamp enhances your decor while providing ample lighting. Add this statement piece to your home and enjoy the blend of style and practicality it brings to your environment.
